summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Visual Mode Resolver system. Backend API correctly returns visual_mode in pattern-v2 responses. BTC shows range_only mode with proper allowed/forbidden elements. ETH shows structure_only mode. Frontend PatternSVGOverlay successfully listens to visual_mode and renders appropriate visualizations.
passed_tests: Pattern V2 BTC API - returns visual_mode with range_only mode
Pattern V2 ETH API - returns visual_mode with structure_only mode
Visual Mode Resolver logic - correct mode assignment
Frontend PatternSVGOverlay - receives and processes visual_mode
Chart rendering - displays appropriate range visualization
API integration - successful pattern-v2 API calls
